content:
# Best AI Video Tools for Wedding Videographers in 2026

Wedding videography involves hours of footage to sort through and edit. AI tools help you deliver beautiful videos faster!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: Fast Wedding Video Editing

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] helps wedding videographers edit footage quickly with AI-powered tools.

### VEED for Wedding Videographers
- **Auto-captions**: Essential for sharing reels
- **Audio enhancement**: Fix shaky audio from ceremonies
- **Background music**: Royalty-free tracks perfect for weddings

**Try VEED Free**: https://veed.io

---

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Auto-Generate Highlight Reels

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] can automatically find the best moments in wedding footage and create highlight reels.

### Pictory for Weddings
- **Auto-highlights**: Find first kisses, dances, and vows
- **Text-to-video**: Create reels from photo albums
- **Quick exports**: Share with couples faster

**Try Pictory**: https://pictory.ai

---
